source.method: curl the HF LeRobot mirror's meta/tasks.jsonl (one JSON obj per line, {task_index, task}); collected unique non-empty 'task' values

instructions: Interact with the objects in diverse but meaningful ways.
Place the fish, sausage, and tomato into the frying pan.
Place the bread, butter, and milk from the table onto the serving area.
Place the pan onto the stove and place the fish and sausage into the pan.
